sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114448" key="xoroiqalh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χοροι-θᾰλής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n114448.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flourishing in the dance,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κοῦραι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.287</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
